---
title: "Introducción a la Estadística"
subtitle: "RMarkdown vs Quarto"
author: "Prof. Pedro L. Luque"
date: "2025-03-12"
date-format: long
institute: "Universidad Sevilla"

format:
  qmd-ptm-ty-slides-typst:
    #output-file: example-handout.pdf
    aspect-ratio: "16-9"
    header-color:  "#003f72"
    section-color: "#AB262D"
    section-color-2: "#df9102"
    accent-color:  "#c0392b"
    font-size: 16pt
    code-bg-color: "#dce8ff"
    output-bg-color: "#99bb00"
    keep-typ: false
    handout: true          # ← modo handout: colapsa los #pause, solo el paso final
    section-level: 2
    slide-numbering: true
    toc-slide: true
    toc-levels: 3
    toc-columns: 2
    toc-font-size: "1em"
    toc-title: "Índice"
---


{{< include example.qmd >}}
